channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  5. VW's Hit List Reportedly Includes the Jetta Sedan, Plus Porsche's Taycan and Future Gas-Fed 718s  Car and Driver

item.title: Wife on Spouse's Plane Horror: 'If We Die, We Die Together' - Newser
item.description:
1. Wife on Spouse's Plane Horror: 'If We Die, We Die Together'  Newser
  2. Wife describes moment husband nearly sucked out of plane: ‘His head and arm were hanging out’  Yahoo
  3. Boeing 737 Cabin Depressurizes After Engine Issue, Injuring Passenger  WSJ
  4. She says her husband was sucked halfway out of a Ryanair plane  USA Today
  5. ‘If we die, we die together’: wife of Ryanair passenger almost sucked through window speaks  The Guardian

item.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon says he’s eyeing up book deals and teaching gigs when he steps away - Fortune
item.description:
